title: Intermittent payments failures with no clear root cause
summary: CI logs show intermittent failures and a connection reset, but the evidence is insufficient to ground a failing test, code location, or root cause. The incident is escalated to human review.

evidence.snippet: Test run finished with intermittent failures

blocked_reasons: Confidence 0.25 is below the human-review threshold.
No failing test or stack trace could be grounded in the logs.
Root cause could not be determined from available evidence.

log_finding.summary: Logs show a connection reset and intermittent failures, but no assertion, stack trace, or specific failing test.

evidence.snippet: Test run finished with intermittent failures

blocked_reasons: No deterministic failing test or stack trace found in logs.

safety_review.summary: No secrets found. Evidence is insufficient for an automated hypothesis; human investigation is required.
blocked_reasons: Confidence is below the human-review threshold.
safety_review.required_human_action: Manually investigate the intermittent failures; insufficient evidence for an automated root cause.
